title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast from New York Tech Week explores how software engineering is changing with AI, discusses tokenmaxxing as companies exhaust AI budgets quickly, covers NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip for running large models on PCs, and examines AI literacy challenges in higher education as students face transforming workplaces.
